summary: The AI agent failed to respond to the patient's inquiry about office hours, resulting in an abrupt end to the call without providing any information.

issues.title: Abrupt Call Termination
issues.details: The agent abruptly ended the call after the patient asked about office hours, indicating a failure to engage with the patient's request. This is a significant issue as it prevents the patient from receiving essential information.
issues.expected: The agent should have provided the office hours for the week as requested by the patient.
